headline: Albemarle CFO Takes On Interim Accounting Role As Oversight Scrutinized
summary: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) has appointed Chief Financial Officer Neal R. Sheorey as interim Principal Accounting Officer. The change follows the retirement of Chief Accounting Officer Donald J. LaBauve Jr. The move concentrates key finance and accounting responsibilities under the current CFO. For a stock that has risen 8.0% year to date and 164.4% over the past year, any adjustment in senior finance leadership is worth noting. Albemarle's current share price of $155.44 comes after the stock...
